Peggy offers to clean for Edward Walton (played by former Likely Lads actor Rodney Bewes), raising Oscar's suspicion she is after his money, but it is Edward's wife, now in a nursing home, who turns out to have a shady past.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Wealthy industrialist Sir Reuben Astwell is murdered after making a deal to sell synthetic rubber to the Germans, leaving the dapper sleuth wondering whether the motive was commercial or political. Evidence found in his chemical factory could hold the key to the mystery - but Poirot is unsure if the victim's widow can be trusted. Starring David Suchet, with Ann Bell and Bill Wallis.(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: DCI Tom Barnaby reluctantly joins wife Joyce on a spa weekend at Swavely Manor, a country house offering treatments to soothe the mind and body. However, as he attempts to unwind, a woman is found dead in a flotation chamber and he promptly abandons his therapy to investigate - but the body count soon rises. The detective eventually wraps up the case, but it proves to be his last as he makes a big decision about his future. John Nettles' final appearance in the long-running series, with guest stars Ronni Ancona, Geraldine James and Lesley Manville.(n)

programme.title: Bancroft
programme.desc: Katherine and Anya make a determined push to get to the bottom of the Laura Fraser case once and for all, hatching a plan to get the DNA evidence they desperately need. Bancroft executes a massive sting operation against Athif Kamara, but things do not run smoothly and she is forced to reveal carefully kept secrets about her past. Thriller, starring Sarah Parish, Faye Marsay and Amara Khan.(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: A woman is found murdered near a driving school and the investigation proves a testing time for Morse and especially Lewis, who has the added distraction of being paired with an attractive female colleague. Detective drama, starring John Thaw and Kevin Whately, with Patrick Malahide, Tessa Wojtczak and Christopher Fulford.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.sub-title: The Mystery of the Spanish Chest
programme.desc: A lavish dinner party proves to be a prelude to murder and intrigue - but fortunately Poirot is among the guests, and soon realises the key to the mystery lies in a duel fought 10 years previously. Drama, starring David Suchet, Caroline Langrishe and John McEnery.(n)

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: Robin gets the chance to play for his college football team - but a cold threatens to earn him an early bath. Flat-share comedy, starring Richard O'Sullivan.(n)

Mystery, starring John Thaw, Kevin Whately, Geoffrey Palmer, Cheryl Campbell and George Costigan.(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: DCI Tom Barnaby reluctantly joins wife Joyce on a spa weekend at Swavely Manor, a country house offering treatments to soothe the mind and body. However, as he attempts to unwind, a woman is found dead in a flotation chamber and he promptly abandons his therapy to investigate - but the body count soon rises. The detective eventually wraps up the case, but it proves to be his last as he makes a big decision about his future. John Nettles' final appearance in the long-running series, with guest stars Ronni Ancona, Geraldine James and Lesley Manville.(n)

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Detective drama, starring Kevin Whately as the senior detective with Laurence Fox as his sidekick Hathaway.(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The bodies of a glamorous senior citizen and a distinguished doctor are found beside a river - and although suspicion for their murders initially falls on poachers, Barnaby suspects a more monetary motive for the attack. However, the case becomes complicated with the discovery that a local restaurateur, who had recently learnt his wife had been having an affair with the male victim, has also met an untimely end. With Honor Blackman, Philip Franks, James Hazeldine and Jeff Rawle.(n)

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.sub-title: It Could be Practically Anywhere on the Island
programme.desc: A trip to Malta sees Harry called on to investigate the abduction of a woman's pet poodle. Robert Vaughn and Nyree Dawn Porter star.(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: The future of a riding school for handicapped children is threatened by the murder of its owner. Meanwhile, Dr Astin's son struggles to adjust to life to his new life.(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.sub-title: I Was Happy Where I Was
programme.desc: A Puerto Rican cop goes undercover in his old neighbourhood to investigate reports of an extortion racket, only to uncover a plot to stir up a war between rival gangs.(n)

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A doctor visits Holmes on behalf of his friend and sponsor Blessington, a nervous invalid whose fragile peace of mind has been thrown into turmoil by a series of mysterious events. Drama, guest starring Patrick Newell and Nicholas Clay, with Jeremy Brett and David Burke.(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur decides he wants to retire and Terry helps him get out of a deal with a dubious consortium of Masonic property developers. Vintage comedy drama, starring George Cole and Dennis Waterman.(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: A crooked foreign diplomat helps arrange the theft of a consignment of silver bullion being transported through Tilbury docks. Bodie and Doyle are assigned to investigate, and it becomes apparent that they have a useful link to the villains via Doyle's girlfriend Deborah. Drama, starring Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins.(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan and Carter uncover a plot to smuggle gold bars into the Middle East disguised as weights for an international strongman competition. Police drama, starring John Thaw and Dennis Waterman.(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.sub-title: Slow Boat to Madness - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. Quincy sets off on a cruise, looking forward to some well-earned rest and relaxation, but a mystery illness breaks out, killing off his fellow passengers.(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Part one of two. Theo tries to enjoy a day off, but gets dragged into dealing with a body found in a stolen car and a woman plotting to kill her husband. William Hurt guest stars.(n)

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: The sleuth investigates the case of a man who has acquired a well-paid but mysterious job - seemingly on account of his red hair. Period detective drama, starring Jeremy Brett and David Burke, with Eric Porter as Moriarty.(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.sub-title: The Loneliness of the Long Distance Entrepreneur
programme.desc: A sudden staffing crisis leaves Arthur with no choice but to employ his nephew Ray to help him sell cut-price cars from Brussels - his idea of entering the European market. Drama, starring George Cole and Gary Webster.(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie works alongside an old friend who once saved his life while serving in the SAS, and has difficulty coping with mounting evidence that his ex-colleague has joined the gang of Italian terrorists they are shadowing. Crime drama, starring Lewis Collins, Martin Shaw and Gordon Jackson.(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan and Carter investigate when a fellow officer is coerced into acting as a getaway driver by the gangsters who have kidnapped his wife. Police drama, starring John Thaw and Dennis Waterman, and featuring a guest appearance by Billy Murray.(n)

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as four contestants pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught.(n)

programme.title: When Football Changed Forever
programme.desc: The dramatic story of the 1991/92 Football League Division One season - the final campaign before the Premier League began. Leeds United overcame fierce rivals Manchester United to emerge as champions, thanks to a certain Frenchman named Eric Cantona.(n)

programme.title: RoboCop (1987)
programme.desc: A police officer in a future Detroit ravaged by crime is seemingly killed in the line of duty, but is rebuilt as a law-enforcing cyborg by the corporation that has taken over running the force. He begins to remember his human life and seeks to bring his killers to justice - a mission that leads him to turn on his corrupt corporate masters. Sci-fi thriller, starring Peter Weller, Nancy Allen, Ronny Cox and Miguel Ferrer.(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.sub-title: Slow Boat to Madness - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. As more new cases of the mystery illness break out on board the luxury liner, Quincy and Dr Carlisle work against the clock to identify the root of the epidemic.(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Part two of two. The body discovered in the stolen Rolls Royce is identified, while Theo tries to track down the woman who killed her husband before she can commit suicide.(n)

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Moriarty seeks revenge on Holmes for foiling his plan to sell the Mona Lisa, and the pair ultimately fight their final battle at the Reichenbach Falls in Switzerland. Jeremy Brett stars as the titular hero, with David Burke making his final appearance as Dr Watson and Eric Porter as Moriarty.(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur buys a large consignment of wine, supposedly brewed by monks. Before he can collect his order it is impounded, but he sneaks into a warehouse and retrieves it anyway. However, a disastrous tasting session at the Winchester reveals the product to be 'corked' and undrinkable and when he and Ray return it in the hope of a later refund they get locked in. George Cole and Gary Webster star.(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle infiltrate a gang smuggling art treasures and industrial secrets out of the country and selling them on to foreign powers. As the investigation proceeds, the duo discover the illicit operation is being run by a country squire in his stately home. Drama, starring Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins.(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A routine surveillance assignment leads Regan and Carter to a massive car-parking fraud. Crackerjack veteran Peter Glaze features in the supporting cast, alongside John Thaw and Dennis Waterman.(n)

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as four contestants pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught.(n)

programme.title: Casino Royale (1967)
programme.desc: Ageing spy James Bond comes out of retirement to tackle a mysterious mastermind who wants to take over the world. Meanwhile, another agent disguises himself as Bond to face the evil genius over the baccarat table. Spoof spy adventure, starring David Niven, Peter Sellers, Woody Allen, Orson Welles, Deborah Kerr and Ursula Andress.(n)

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: The duo try to track down an American colonel tormented by memories his harrowing experiences while in command of an air base in Vietnam. Robert Vaughn and Nyree Dawn Porter star.(n)

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: An interpreter claims to have been abducted by two villains who forced him to interrogate a badly bruised and obviously distressed Greek captive unable to speak English. Period detective drama, starring Jeremy Brett.(n)

programme.title: The Big Fish Off
programme.desc: Game show in which two celebrity guests take part in a series of fishing challenges. In the first episode, owner of the Sugar Hut nightclub Mick Norcross brings along his friend, Hollywood actor Tamer Hassan, but things get off to a bad start when Tamer announces that he cannot think of anything worse than golf or fishing. With team captains Ali Hamidi and Dean Macey.(n)

programme.title: Monster Carp
programme.desc: Ali Hamidi is joined by Tom Dove and Neil Spooner at the renowned Gigantica Lakes complex in the Champagne region of France, hoping to hook a huge fish.(n)

programme.title: Junk and Disorderly
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Sam Lovegrove buy and transform a BSA Bantam from a humble roadster into a trial bike. However, they soon discover it is far easier to restore than it is to sell.(n)

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A solicitor enlists Holmes to help clear him of murdering eccentric builder Jonas Oldacre, whose considerable personal fortune he stood to inherit. Drama, starring Jeremy Brett as the famed Victorian detective.(n)

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: The Sign of Four
programme.desc: Super-sleuth Sherlock Holmes leaves his Baker Street lair to solve mysterious goings-on in a vintage edition of Arthur Conan Doyle's Victorian drama. Starring Peter Cushing as the deductive genius, alongside Nigel Stock and William Lucas.(n)

programme.title: Lonely Are the Brave (1962)
programme.desc: A rebellious modern-day cowboy breaks out of jail and escapes on horseback - but reckons without the relentlessness of the authorities, who give chase by car and helicopter. A dogged sheriff leads the pursuit, coming to sympathise with his quarry. Western, starring Kirk Douglas, Walter Matthau, Gena Rowlands and George Kennedy.(n)

In an experiment led by three geriatric specialists, the young and older group follow the same timetable in a new nursery set within a retirement village near Bristol. The senior group will undergo tests to measure mood, memory and mobility during their daily interaction with the kids.(n)

programme.title: Secrets of Egypt's Valley of the Kings
programme.desc: Archaeologists find new evidence about how the ancient Egyptians prepared for the afterlife, including a sacred text found in the tomb of the great pharaoh Seti I which was believed to guarantee life after death. An expedition unearths a sealed tomb that has lain untouched for 4000 years, and discovers disturbing evidence of the lengths grave robbers will go to in search of treasure.(n)

programme.desc: A prolific offender is landed with an eyewatering bill to square off three years of illegal travel, while the police must step in when one suspect is found in possession of a banned substance. programme.title: Paddington Station 24/7
programme.sub-title: Paddington: A Year on the Tracks
programme.desc: Documentary following 12 months of Paddington train station and the Western network, following the staff, engineers, drivers and signalers who keep the railway running. Cheltenham races sees thousands of extra passengers arrive - many of whom fancy an early morning tipple - while chaos ensues when a passenger chases a fraudster round the station, accusing him of selling her out-of-date football tickets. In Swindon, the control room staff hear that heavy rainfall might cause flooding and block the mainline to Cornwall - leaving them facing a big decision.(n)

programme.title: Inside the Tube: Going Underground
programme.desc: Engineer and urban explorer Rob Bell examines the hidden story of how the world's oldest underground railway was built. He begins by exploring the construction of what is known today as the Northern Line, which runs 36 miles through London and connects the boroughs north and south of the Thames.(n)

programme.title: Air Force One (1997)

Meanwhile, the vice president tries to manage the crisis from Washington and has to decide whether to shoot the aircraft down. Action thriller, starring Harrison Ford, Gary Oldman, Glenn Close, Dean Stockwell and William H Macy.(n)

programme.title: The World's Most Scenic Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Cameras capture a route through Spain, beginning near Leon, part of the famous north Spanish Pilgrimage, in the Picos de Europa mountains. The railway then runs through the Basque country before the famous Guggenheim Museum greets travellers in Bilbao. In Galicia, the gorges, coastline and sea bridges are a sight for sore eyes, and a speciality cider tour refreshes the train's guests. The journey ends in Ferrol, a spectacular harbour that has been a major shipbuilding centre for most of its history and has been a key city in many wars. Narrated by Bill Nighy.(n)

programme.title: The World's Most Scenic Railway Journeys
programme.desc: A 500-mile journey across South Africa in a luxury hotel train, which travels between Pretoria and Durban on the coast over the course of three days. The first stop along the way is Nambiti Private Game Reserve, home to rhinos and elephants, before moving on to the country's most famous battlefields and the Drakensberg Mountains. Passengers have a chance to explore the ancient art of the San people and visit a vineyard that produces some of South Africa's finest wines. Narrated by Bill Nighy.(n)

programme.title: Portillo's Empire Journey
programme.desc: Michael Portillo tells the story of how a small island on the edge of Europe built the biggest empire the world has ever seen. In the first episode, Michael travels to India to uncover how the British East India Company - the world's first multinational corporation - raised a private army to create an empire. Beginning his journey in the slums of Kolkata, he explores the ruins of the grand residence of Clive of India, who became the undisputed ruler of Bengal - amassing a vast personal fortune and making millions for shareholders in Britain.(n)

Black comedy based on the 1960s TV series, starring Anjelica Huston, Raul Julia, Christopher Lloyd, Christina Ricci, Jimmy Workman and Carel Struycken.(n)

programme.title: 5 News Weekend
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world.(n)

programme.title: Inside
programme.desc: Documentary examining the history of the royal residence, which was the palace where Queen Victoria was born and raised. The building was converted into a heavy artillery base during the Second World War, when it also saw a German PoW camp established in the grounds.(n)

programme.title: How the Victorians Built Britain
programme.desc: Michael Buerk narrates a documentary looking at landmark concepts and structures from the Victorian era that transformed the nation, examining sewers, bridges and trains, including London's underground. The programme also looks at advancements in hospitals and surgery, the ships that changed trading pathways for ever, and holidays.(n)

programme.title: Queen Victoria and Her Tragic Family
programme.desc: Documentary following the story of the monarch after the death of her husband Albert, examining how her children rebelled against their mother one by one. The programme also explores the possibility that Princess Louise - Victoria and Albert's sixth child - had an illegitimate baby with her brother's tutor.(n)

programme.title: Britain's Best Loved Double Acts
programme.desc: Stand-out comedy moments from some of the greatest double acts to have graced the small screen, with famous fans and colleagues revealing just what makes them so funny. Those featured include Morecambe and Wise, French and Saunders, the Two Ronnies, Ant and Dec, Cannon and Ball, and Little and Large - as well as fictional duos George and Mildred, Cissie and Ada, Smashie and Nicey, and Wallace and Gromit.(n)

programme.title: Two Thousand Women (1944)
programme.desc: Female prisoners struggle to cope with living in a German internment camp, but find common cause in making life difficult for their captors. When three British airmen are shot down over the prison, they keep them hidden from the Germans while plotting a way to smuggle them out safely. Second World War comedy, with Phyllis Calvert, Flora Robson, Patricia Roc and Renee Houston.(n)

programme.title: Thoroughly Modern Millie (1967)
programme.desc: A naive woman leaves her rural roots behind to seek fortune and romance in 1920s New York. She finds work as a secretary to a business tycoon, but he happens to be madly in love with her friend. However, before long she is wooed instead by a smitten salesman. Meanwhile, back at her boarding house, she stumbles across a shocking criminal enterprise involving the landlady. Musical comedy, with Julie Andrews, James Fox and Mary Tyler Moore.(n)

programme.title: This Happy Breed (1944)
programme.desc: A working-class family moves into a new suburban home after the father returns from service in the First World War. However, the couple and their children struggle to adjust to life higher up the social ladder. David Lean's drama, adapted by Noel Coward from his play, starring Robert Newton, Celia Johnson, Robert Stanley Holloway and John Mills.(n)

programme.title: Mud (2012)
programme.desc: Two boys exploring an island on the Mississippi discover a fugitive has made his home there. He tells them he is on the run from bounty hunters after killing a man, and needs their help to be reunited with his lost love. As they ferry messages to the woman in question, the youngsters are forced to come to terms with the complexity of adult relationships. Drama, starring Matthew McConaughey and Reese Witherspoon.(n)

programme.title: Four Weddings and a Funeral (1994)
programme.desc: A London man's misfortunes in love look set to change when he meets an American beauty. However, the prospect of a transatlantic relationship succeeding seems slim, so the pair go their separate ways - only for him to realise he is unable to get her out of his mind. Richard Curtis's comedy, with Hugh Grant, Andie MacDowell, John Hannah, Charlotte Coleman, Kristin Scott Thomas, Simon Callow and James Fleet.(n)

programme.title: The Diary of a Teenage Girl (2015)
programme.desc: A girl growing up in 1970s San Francisco looks for a sense of certainty in a rapidly changing world. She finds solace in an affair with her mother's boyfriend, but also finds a personal refuge in developing her own artistic talents. Drama based on Phoebe Gloeckner's novel, starring Bel Powley, Alexander Skarsgard and Kristen Wiig.(n)

programme.title: Something in the Air (2012)
programme.desc: An idealistic student tries to reconcile his political beliefs with his artistic ambitions in a Paris still facing an uncertain future in the aftermath of the 1968 riots. After his girlfriend breaks up with him, he falls in with a band of left-wing activists and joins them on an eye-opening journey through Italy. Drama, starring Clement Metayer and Lola Creton. In French, English and Italian.(n)

programme.title: Waterloo Road (1944)
programme.desc: A soldier serving in the Second World War discovers his wife has betrayed him by having an affair with a petty crook, so he resolves to settle matters and deserts from the army. He returns to a Blitz-ravaged London to confront his rival, but his quest for retribution is interrupted by an air raid. Drama, starring John Mills, Joy Shelton, Alastair Sim and Stewart Granger.(n)

programme.title: The Riddle of the Sands (1979)
programme.desc: An English yachtsman sailing round the coast of Germany in 1901 encounters a naval officer who has betrayed his country. Enlisting the aid of a friend, he discovers a plan by Kaiser Wilhelm to invade Britain - which they are the only ones in a position to stop. Spy thriller, starring Simon MacCorkindale, Michael York and Jenny Agutter.(n)

programme.title: The Naked Truth (1957)
programme.desc: Celebrities threatened with blackmail decide they would rather murder the extortionist than pay him, but things do not go according to plan. Comedy, starring Terry-Thomas, Peter Sellers, Dennis Price, Peggy Mount, Shirley Eaton and Joan Sims.(n)

programme.title: The Man in the Iron Mask (1977)
programme.desc: The despotic king of France imprisons his identical twin and sees to it that he always wears a metal mask to avoid being identified, but musketeer D'Artagnan has a plan to restore the rightful heir to the throne. Swashbuckling adventure, based on the classic story by Alexandre Dumas, starring Richard Chamberlain in a dual role, with Patrick McGoohan, Louis Jourdan and Jenny Agutter.(n)

programme.title: Home Alone 2: Lost in New York (1992)
programme.desc: Hapless youngster Kevin somehow manages to catch the wrong plane and finds himself heading for New York, while his family jets off to Florida. Having got his hands on his father's credit card, he is enjoying the good life staying in a luxury hotel - until he bumps into two familiar burglars with an axe to grind. Comedy sequel, starring Macaulay Culkin, Joe Pesci, Daniel Stern, Brenda Fricker and Tim Curry.(n)

programme.title: The Martian (2015)
programme.desc: A manned mission to Mars is abruptly abandoned, with one crew member left for dead. However, the astronaut has survived and faces a series of challenges - to contact Earth and arrange his rescue and to survive for the years it will take for a spacecraft to reach him on resources intended to last the crew a month. Ridley Scott's sci-fi drama based on the novel by Andy Weir, starring Matt Damon, Jessica Chastain, Kristen Wiig and Chiwetel Ejiofor.(n)

programme.title: Morgan (2016)
programme.desc: A corporate risk-management consultant decides whether or not to destroy an artificially created humanoid, who was at the centre of a disturbing accident and could pose a potential threat to the human race - or a fantastic opportunity. Sci-fi thriller, starring Kate Mara, Anya Taylor-Joy, Rose Leslie and Michelle Yeoh.(n)

programme.title: Pet (2016)
programme.desc: A man bumps into an old high-school crush on the bus and becomes obsessed with her once more, eventually abducting her and imprisoning her in a cage in the rat-infested basement of the animal shelter where he works. Horror thriller, starring Dominic Monaghan, Ksenia Solo and Jennette McCurdy.(n)

programme.title: Beneath the Planet of the Apes (1969)
programme.desc: A second astronaut arrives on the strange simian-dominated world searching for his predecessor. As he journeys into the infamous forbidden zone, he discovers an underground cult of psychic mutants. Meanwhile, a military coup has taken place among the ape society, leading to an inevitable battle. Sci-fi sequel, with James Franciscus, Charlton Heston and Kim Hunter.(n)

programme.title: Animal Farm (1954)
programme.desc: Animals rebel against their unscrupulous owner and take control of his farm, vowing to run things fairly, with equality for all. However, the pigs leading the revolt succumb to greed and corruption, culminating in violence and oppression. Animated drama based on George Orwell's novel, narrated by Gordon Heath and with Maurice Denham providing the voices for all the characters.(n)

programme.title: The Choice (2016)
programme.desc: Two neighbours find themselves overwhelmingly attracted to each other, and make substantial changes in their lives to be together - one breaking off a long-term relationship and the other conquering his fear of commitment. Over the next 10 years, their feelings for each other are tested by a series of challenges. Romantic drama based on Nicholas Sparks' novel, starring Benjamin Walker and Teresa Palmer.(n)

programme.title: Night at the Museum: Battle of the Smithsonian (2009)
programme.desc: The living exhibits at New York's Museum of Natural History are shipped to Washington's Smithsonian Institution - along with the artefact that brought them to life in the first place. Nightwatchman Larry tries to retrieve it, only to find the contents of the world's largest museum have been reanimated, including a pharaoh determined to take over the world. Fantasy comedy sequel, starring Ben Stiller, Amy Adams, Owen Wilson and Steve Coogan.(n)

programme.title: Cowboys & Aliens (2011)
programme.desc: A Wild-West town dominated by a cattle baron comes under attack by invaders from another world. It falls to a mysterious stranger with no memory to unite the townsfolk, a gang of outlaws and an Apache tribe, in a bid to fight back against the aliens, and learn the truth about his own past. Sci-fi Western, with Daniel Craig, Harrison Ford, Olivia Wilde and Sam Rockwell.(n)

programme.title: Disturbia (2007)
programme.desc: A troubled teenager is sentenced to three months under house arrest for attacking a teacher, and passes the time by spying on his neighbours. However, one day he notices something suspicious and becomes convinced one of them is a serial killer. Thriller, starring Shia LaBeouf, Carrie-Anne Moss, David Morse and Sarah Roemer.(n)

programme.title: Attack the Block (2011)
programme.desc: A student nurse living in a south London tower block escapes a dangerous encounter with a teenage gang when aliens invade. As the creatures cause mayhem throughout the estate, she joins forces with her would-be attackers to fight off the extraterrestrial forces. Sci-fi comedy thriller, with Jodie Whittaker, John Boyega and Nick Frost.(n)

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Jeff reluctantly attends a video-game launch party when Audrey invites her friends round, and Timmy is amused to discover Russell is the inspiration for the title. Comedy, starring Patrick Warburton and Megyn Price.(n)

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Audrey forces Jeff to give up tickets to an ice-hockey game to attend her boss's party, so he spends the evening trying to avoid finding out the score, while at the match Timmy roots for the away team. Adam finds the ideal birthday present for Jennifer.(n)

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: When Sabrina tries to pull Miles away from his latest conspiracy theory and into some semblance of a social life, she unknowingly pushes him right into the hands of a cult.(n)

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.sub-title: Some of My Best Friends Are Half-Mortals
programme.desc: Tired of hiding her true identity when dating normal guys, Sabrina agrees to be fixed up by Zelda with a handsome and charming witch Derek.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: When Joe and Ryder sell some of Mel's old belongings, they accidentally dispose of a very personal item that she wants to get back. Desperate to reclaim it, Mel and Joe turn to crime to achieve their aims. Elsewhere, Lennox discovers that her new pen pal wants to meet her in person. Comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Joe begins dating Candice (Krista Allen), the mother of one of the students he is tutoring, and devises an alternative payment plan for her. However, he winds up earning himself a bad reputation among the other mothers in the neighbourhood. Family comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben and Tucker compete for the attention of a girl they met while out clubbing, both taking home her phone number, before eventually battling on the dance floor to see who should date her. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben begs supermum Izzy to let him join her parenting class, so she meets him for a one-on-one tutorial to bring him up to speed. Meanwhile, Tucker and Danny transform the laundry room into a 'man cave', and Bonnie and Riley find themselves in a spot of trouble thanks to baby Emma.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard is put in charge of looking after Stephen Hawking's wheelchair when the famous scientist comes to lecture at the university for a week - and takes advantage of his position to blackmail Sheldon into performing assorted unpleasant tasks. Guest starring Stephen Hawking.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Sheldon and Raj organise a stag party for Howard, but stories about his sexual history are unwittingly revealed, and he has to persuade bride-to-be Bernadette not to call off the wedding. Comedy, starring Simon Helberg and Kunal Nayyar.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Hoping that Pops' good luck can rub off on him, Adam takes to gambling at school - but ends up losing his toys. Erica wants to take part in a popular TV dance show, but when she gets the chance her dream quickly turns into a nightmare.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam and Beverly decide to create a music video to help Erica's application to Julliard stand out, but the production does not go as planned. When Murray bonds with Lainey's father Bill, he learns what it means to be a real friend. Tim Meadows and David Koechner guest star.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Boyle brings Peralta into a case when a psychiatrist reports one of his patients missing, while Santiago believes she has accidentally received a package meant for Jeffords.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Work has become so busy for Peralta and Santiago that they end up celebrating their first wedding anniversary while standing guard over a comatose drugs baron who has been rushed into hospital after being shot.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The gang goes to a bar and runs into Penny's old boyfriend Zack, while Bernadette is left to spend the evening with Sheldon when she cannot go wine tasting with the others. Elsewhere, things do not go to plan when Raj introduces his new girlfriend, Claire. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon discovers a surprise screening of The Avengers is scheduled at a local cinema, complete with a Q&A session with the film's director, Joss Whedon. However, the event just happens to clash with time he'd planned to spend with Amy, so he decides to pay Stuart to be his subtitute for the afternoon while he and the other boys immerse themselves in Marvel superheroics. Meanwhile, Leonard's mother Beverly arrives in town for an extended visit, and Penny takes the opportunity to bond with her new mother-in-law - and to make up for not inviting her to the wedding. Comedy, guest starring Christine Baranski.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel wants to get a dog for the household, but Joe is against the idea and argues that he will be the one who gets stuck looking after the animal all off the time. Meanwhile, Ryder finds himself spending more and more time with Stella's daughter rather than with Stella herself. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Zander comes to the house to see Lennox and she begins to feel conflicted about dating her teaching assistant. Meanwhile, Mel persuades Joe to attend a couples therapy session - but is caught off guard when the therapist turns out to be one of his ex-girlfriends. Family comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben, Danny and Tucker go in search of Emma's missing stuffed animal toy. Meanwhile Riley hosts a book club in a bid to make friends with the cool girls at work - but faces trouble when her mother and Bonnie invite themselves along. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau, with guest star Caroline Rhea.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Riley plans to break up with Fitch, but receives news that he is dead. She then meets Fitch's dad, Winston Douglas, who asks her to deliver the eulogy at the funeral, and he tells her Fitch planned to propose to her. Meanwhile, Ben realises he might be in love with Megan, but she thinks things are moving too quickly. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake meets an attractive medical examiner at a crime scene, but annoys his colleagues when his attempts to get together with her cause a hold-up with an autopsy report. Meanwhile, Amy discovers Jeffords has some hidden talents when the police sketch artist goes off sick.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The cops of the 99th Precinct become the latest victim of the Vulture, a detective from Major Crimes with a habit of taking over investigations just as they are about to be solved. However, Jake is determined not to let the hotshot steal his thunder and races to close his case first. Meanwhile, Holt and Gina help Terry regain his right to carry a gun.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly tries to get Murray to invite his grouchy father to Thanksgiving dinner, but her brother-in-law Marvin interferes. Barry and Erica compete when it is suggested they should give the holiday toast. Judd Hirsch (Taxi) guest stars.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: After Murray agrees to let him join the junior Reserve Officers Training Corps, Barry changes his mind when the going gets tough and begs Beverly to get him out of it. Adam objects when Pops buys a timeshare holiday home in Florida. Judd Hirsch (Taxi) guest stars.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon goes to great lengths to convince Amy that they should have a baby together after they successfully complete a scientific experiment using their DNA samples. Raj is too embarrassed to tell his friends what the new woman in his life does for a living.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon cannot contain his jealousy when he hears that his university colleague Bert has won a prestigious fellowship with an impressive grant. Elsewhere, Howard finds an old remote-controlled toy he made in the past, but the rest of the group do not seemed to be too impressed by it. Stephen Hawking guest stars.(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks Favourites
programme.desc: Former Hollyoaks star Kieron Richardson relives the soap's show-stopping stunts, recalling the moment a devastating explosion rips through Hollyoaks High.(n)

programme.title: Celebrity Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Dani Harmer is the next to host, but having never chopped an onion before, let alone thrown a dinner party, it proves to be a night of firsts for the Tracy Beaker star.(n)

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Baby Tooth and the Egyptian God of Knowledge
programme.desc: The eccentric youngster makes a scientific breakthrough at the dentist's office. Dale and Meemaw go to the casino and Georgie makes a big mistake when he is left in charge of the store.(n)

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Secret Letter and a Lowly Disc of Processed Meat
programme.desc: The eccentric youngster discovers that Mary has been keeping a secret about his future. Meemaw is furious when she learns Dale fired Georgie.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: A prank goes disastrously wrong, destroying a crucial piece of evidence, leaving the officers trying to solve the mystery - with the help of visiting Detective Dillman (JK Simmons).(n)

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: The duo encounter an animal with magic powers during one of their adventures into outer space.(n)

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: The duo find themselves in a fight against face-hugging aliens who just happen to have an M&Ms store.(n)

programme.title: Harley Quinn
programme.desc: Harley tries to get noticed by the Legion of Doom by crashing one of their criminal enterprises with the help of Poison Ivy. Will she succeed or face humiliation? Animation, voiced by Kaley Cuoco and Lake Bell.(n)

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: Jerry gets everyone to ditch their mobile phones and tablets so that the family can really bond when his parents pay a holiday visit and bring along a new friend. Meanwhile, Rick builds a tiny amusement park inside the body of his homeless friend Ruben, but when problems arise he must shrink Morty down and inject him into the site in an attempt to save Ruben's life. Special Christmas episode guest starring Dana Carvey and John Oliver.(n)

programme.title: Robot Chicken
programme.desc: Animated comedy series, created by Seth Green and Matthew Senreich. Master Chief and Cortana have an uncomfortable conversation, while Drones are put into action on the GI Joe team.(n)

programme.title: Mr Pickles
programme.desc: Tommy tries to come up with some killer jokes for the Old Town Talent Show, and his efforts cause him to cross paths with a mysterious old woman who lives in a haunted house.(n)

programme.title: Made in Chelsea
programme.desc: Binky begins to lose patience with Jamie over his continued indecision regarding their relationship, while Cheska turns her attentions to new boy Sam. Spencer's ex-girlfriend, Sophia Sassoon, is back on the scene after years of living in New York and Binky, Ollie and Cheska head for a detox retreat in the country to mark Gabriella's return from Greece.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy is furious when she learns that Sheldon has shared intimate details of their relationship with his colleagues at the university, prompting their first fight since moving in together. Raj considers trying to live without financial support from his father, who thinks he is spoilt.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Cut off from his father's fortune, Raj struggles to balance his books, so decides to appoint Sheldon to organise his finances and get him out of debt. Penny considers joining the guys at Comic-Con because she thinks Leonard wants her to come along.(n)

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The nation's favourite armchair critics share their opinions on what they watched during November, 2015. Programmes eliciting their instant reactions and lively - sometimes emotional - discussions include The X Factor, Colour: The Spectrum of Science, I'm a Celebrity Get Me Out of Here!, Simply Nigella, The Hunt, First Dates and the news.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: When Sabrina tries to pull Miles away from his latest conspiracy theory and into some semblance of a social life, she unknowingly pushes him right into the hands of a cult.(n)

programme.sub-title: Some of My Best Friends Are Half-Mortals
programme.desc: Tired of hiding her true identity when dating normal guys, Sabrina agrees to be fixed up by Zelda with a handsome and charming witch Derek.(n)

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Audrey looks into surrogacy, but frightens off a potential candidate by being overly enthusiastic, while Russell pokes fun at Jennifer and Adam's wedding website. Comedy, starring David Spade and Megyn Price.(n)

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Audrey attends her high-school reunion in Nebraska, intent on proving to former classmates how fulfilling her life is in New York City, while Russell crashes Timmy's couples night after discovering he is not on the invite list. Megyn Price and David Spade star.(n)

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina is devastated when she receives her first C for a class assignment, but her grades start to improve when Zelda gets romantically involved with her professor.(n)

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina opts to spend a picture-perfect Christmas with Morgan and her family rather than endure the annual insanity with Hilda and Zelda - but soon discovers that even mortals have problems. Melissa Joan Hart stars.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.sub-title: What Happens in Jersey - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. Joe's dying grandmother begs him to come and visit one last time on her birthday, and to bring his wife Tiffany along. He had failed to tell his family about the divorce, so Mel is forced to take a road trip to New Jersey and pose as his ex-wife at the party. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.sub-title: What Happens in Jersey - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. Joe's dying grandmother begs him to visit one last time on her birthday, and to bring his wife Tiffany along. He had failed to tell his family about the divorce, so Mel is forced to take a road trip to New Jersey to pose as his ex-wife at the party. Family comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben tries to bring everyone together for Emma's first Christmas photo, including his father Ray (Greg Grunberg) who has been keeping a secret from the family. Meanwhile, Riley and Tucker retrieve Danny's old high-school journal and try to find out who he had a crush on. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau and Chelsea Kane.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Bridesmaid Riley organises a perfect wedding for her friends Katie and Dave but is horrified when Ben invites his wild high-school pal Gene to the event. After a night of drinking with his childhood buddy at the rehearsal dinner, Ben is shocked to wake up on the wedding day with the bride in his bed.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard tries to use his wedding as an excuse to avoid being sent into space, but ends up accepting the mission. Amy plots to get Sheldon to take the next step in their relationship, while Leonard accidentally asks Penny to marry him.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: As Howard and his fellow astronauts sit in the space shuttle awaiting launch, he reflects on the tumultuous events of the previous few days, when he and Bernadette tried to get married. Meanwhile, his friends witness the blast-off on TV at home.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica is accepted into a summer arts school, but Murray struggles to express his pride in his daughter. Barry takes up the role of school sports mascot, but fails to realise that students from a rival school are planning to beat up the mascot at an upcoming game.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Lainey, Erica and Barry plan a big Risky Business-inspired party at Lainey's house while her father is out of town. However, when the gathering gets out of control, Beverly has to come to their rescue. Elsewhere, Adam annoys Murray by talking to Dana on the phone for hours on end.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Captain Holt and Peralta investigate when three valuable antique coins are stolen from the university where Kevin works as a lecturer. Meanwhile, back at the precinct, Jeffords and Santiago get competitive about taking the squad out for lunch.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and the squad must track down a hacker who has infiltrated the precinct's servers, compromising protected information on undercover agents. Rosa deals with relationship issues, while Hitchcock and Scully attempt to cook the perfect lasagne.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Conflict arises when Leonard's newly divorced parents and Sheldon's devoutly religious mother are all in town at the same time. And when Howard and Raj are contacted about the guidance system they've developed, they assume that the government is out to get them. Laurie Metcalf, Christine Baranski and Judd Hirsch guest star.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The friends struggle through an awkward morning after Sheldon's mother and Leonard's father share an evening together. Penny's family arrives in town to attend Penny and Leonard's second wedding ceremony. Keith Carradine, Laurie Metcalf, Christine Baranski and Judd Hirsch guest star.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel and Joe's friendship with Nate and Gillian is jeopardised when a secret is revealed, and Zander begs Ryder to let him move into the basement without Lennox's knowledge, after he drops out of art school. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Lennox secretly dates her teaching assistant, and when Joe and Mel find out, they try to put an end to the relationship - only things do not go according to plan. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.sub-title: All's Flair in Love and War
programme.desc: Tucker's girlfriend Vanessa makes Ben's life miserable when she gets the assistant manager job at his bar, and tries to impose new hours and uniforms. However, he seizes an opportunity to get back at her by ruining a large event she is planning. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben's feelings are hurt when Riley wants to talk to Danny and not him about her bar exam woes, but she finally tells him that she has taken the test three times without passing. Determined to support his friend, Ben tries to convince her not to give up on her dreams of becoming a lawyer. Starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The precinct's staff prepare for an unusually busy night as the neighbourhood gets into the Halloween spirit, and Amy falls into a particularly foul mood when she is forced to wear a fancy-dress costume during an undercover operation. Meanwhile, Jake bets Captain Holt that he can steal his Medal of Valour before midnight - a challenge that prompts him to don his own selection of disguises.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake makes an arrest without much proof, and so has to spend the next 48 hours collecting enough evidence to keep his suspect in custody. While his co-workers are forced to help him out over the weekend, Charles judges a pie contest between Rosa and Gina, and the Captain gives advice to Terry, who has a problem involving his brother-in-law. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly worries that the family's holiday traditions have grown stale, so she launches a new celebration called 'Super Hanukkah'. Feeling ignored by his older brother, Adam goes to great lengths to make Barry spend more time with him.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam and Barry team up to form a rap super-group just like the Beastie Boys. Beverly puts pressure on Murray to let her redesign the kitchen, but when he refuses to allow it she comes up with a devious plan.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon, Amy, Leonard and Penny do their best to divide up all their possessions into two separate households, but tension ensues. Raj and Stuart compete to become indispensable to Howard and Bernadette as the baby's arrival looms. Christopher Lloyd (Back to the Future) guest stars.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy's attempts to celebrate her birthday with an intimate night at home are interrupted by the news that Bernadette has gone into labour. However, it transpires that Howard, Raj and Stuart may have rushed the expectant mother to the hospital too early, with Raj having difficulty keeping the gender of the unborn child a secret.(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks Favourites
programme.desc: Former Hollyoaks star Kieron Richardson continues to relive the soap's show-stopping stunts, recalling the aftermath of the devastating explosion at Hollyoaks High.(n)

programme.title: Celebrity Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The contest comes to a close at the home of Made in Chelsea stalwart Mark Francis, who hopes to win his guests over with a menu inspired by his Italian heritage. programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Stuart hosts a Halloween party at the comic-book store, and Howard talks incessantly about his work on board the International Space Station, annoying his wife and friends. Penny and Leonard have a steamy encounter at the lab. Guest starring real-life astronaut Buzz Aldrin.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon upsets guest star Stephen Hawking when they play an online game of Words with Friends, until Howard advises him to let the scientist win. Elsewhere, Penny enrols in a college class, but decides to keep it a secret from Leonard. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Simon Helberg.(n)

programme.title: Taken (2008)
programme.desc: An American teenager travelling through Europe is abducted by a gang of sex traffickers. However, what the kidnappers do not realise is that the girl's father is a former CIA agent, who employs all his old skills as he searches for the criminals and tries to rescue his daughter. Thriller, starring Liam Neeson, Famke Janssen and Maggie Grace.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Penny offer Sheldon's old room to Raj after he is forced to move out of his apartment to save money, leading to unexpected conflict among the gang and some unwanted observations from Leonard's mother. Christine Baranski guests.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Penny and Raj settle into their new living arrangement, but Penny and Raj get along so well together that Leonard starts to feel left out. Sheldon expresses an interest in Amy's work and they begin to collaborate on a scientific project.(n)

programme.title: Made in Chelsea
programme.desc: Jamie continues to pursue Binky after being turned down for a second date, and declares his feelings for her at Proudlock's party. Meanwhile, Andy goes on a date with the new girl in town, and Ollie comforts Gabriella when she splits up with her boyfriend.(n)

programme.title: Gogglebox

Nanny and part-time weightlifter Lucy hopes to pick up a new partner in the restaurant - and it seems as though charity administrator Caroline may be the one for her - while Alistair, who at 5ft 7 worries about his height, meets magazine editor Emily. Will he be talking tall after their date?(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard tries to use his wedding as an excuse to avoid being sent into space, but ends up accepting the mission. Amy plots to get Sheldon to take the next step in their relationship, while Leonard accidentally asks Penny to marry him.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: As Howard and his fellow astronauts sit in the space shuttle awaiting launch, he reflects on the tumultuous events of the previous few days, when he and Bernadette tried to get married. Meanwhile, his friends witness the blast-off on TV at home.(n)

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina is devastated when she receives her first C for a class assignment, but her grades start to improve when Zelda gets romantically involved with her professor.(n)

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch

programme.title: The Goldbergs

Barry lobbies for the dance to be based on his favourite movie Footloose, while Adam and Pops encourage Murray to learn to dance in order to make Beverly happy.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Geoff struggles to balance demands from the Jenkintown Posse and Erica. Meanwhile, Adam faces a crisis of confidence over his career path.(n)

programme.desc: Lainey has a realisation about CB, and Principal Glascott uses the season's bad football team to teach Coach Mellor how to be both a good winner and a good loser.(n)

programme.desc: Peralta and the squad must track down a hacker who has infiltrated the precinct's servers, compromising protected information on undercover agents. Rosa deals with relationship issues, while Hitchcock and Scully attempt to cook the perfect lasagne.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: A prank goes disastrously wrong, destroying a crucial piece of evidence, leaving the officers trying to solve the mystery - with the help of visiting Detective Dillman (JK Simmons).(n)

programme.title: Gogglebox

First aired in December 2015.(n)

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Treasures

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien travel to East Sussex in their hunt to discover valuable items 'lost' in people's homes, with their finds including some Victorian street lamps.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Grand Designs

programme.title: Outlander

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Treasures

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Nigel tackles dated windows and Debbie creates her first mural as the duo set to work transforming a room in a rundown conservatory into a bright new garden room.(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets Tamayo Hussey, who has missed Japan since she moved to the UK 14 years earlier with her husband, quantum physics professor Nigel. The couple want to transform a 1960s forester's lodge into a unique Japanese house, complete with a tatami room - decorated in her homeland's traditional style - sliding paper walls and a bath on the roof. Keen to keep costs down, they have decided to engage only the design skills - rather than the full services - of an architect, so with no previous building experience they tackle the project alone.(n)

programme.desc: Stephan, 39, is rushed to St George's with internal bleeding from his femoral artery, caused by complications following an angiogram he had the day before, and doctors are concerned his heart could be under potentially fatal strain. programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Twelve-year-old Tulsi is airlifted to St George's after falling from a cliff near her home in Hastings, and CT scans reveal she requires emergency brain surgery. Meanwhile, 39-year-old Adam is rushed to A&E after his motorbike collided with a car, leaving him with an obvious and painful leg injury, and 70-year-old retired mechanic Ron is treated after trapping his hand between two vehicles while helping his friend fix their car.(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Peter and Karen Greaves from Wiltshire want a bolthole on Spain's Costa Blanca that they can escape to at a moment's notice. Sara Damergi shows them a selection of properties for £50,000 or less.(n)

programme.desc: Bedfordshire couple John and Elaine Want plan a permanent move to the Alicante region of southern Spain, and Sara Damergi takes them to view potential homes within their budget of £70,000.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Beauty pageant queen Pippa Langhorne throws the second party in Worcestershire, and hopes to impress her fellow diners with a sophisticated Midsummer Night's Dream-themed event. However, her starter fails to win the approval of shellfish-hating Claire Wier, and Tim Lawson disapproves on the basis of his friendship with fish. Everyone is surprised as the hostess brings out an unusual dessert, and a guest appearance by her singing dog Buddy rounds off a memorable evening.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Publican Tim Lawson hosts the third dinner party in Worcestershire, laying on a country-themed evening featuring a novel take on prawn cocktail and a creamy main course. Chris Sheppard finds himself confronted about his tan, while tension mounts between Pippa Langhorne and Claire Wier, who takes issue with her fellow diner's claims to have a white bread allergy.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Teresa Cox hosts the fourth dinner party challenge from Worcestershire and sets her store on wooing the guests with a lobster starter and an extravagant main course. The menu seems to go down well with the diners, but when the conversation turns to the paranormal there are mixed reactions.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Chris Sheppard hosts the final dinner party in Worcestershire, throwing a black-tie-themed evening. He impresses some of his guests with his home-made sweet chilli sauce and potato towers - although Claire Wier finds the presentation pretentious - before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Former pop singer Danny Karne welcomes guests to the Pavilion, his fashion and rock 'n' roll-themed hotel in central London, and the sports car parked outside wows his visitors. But the petrol-head's decision to take his fellow hoteliers to a motoring museum goes down badly when one of them reveals he has no passion for cars.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: John Luce and his partner Pat Sutton invite their fellow hoteliers to the Fox and Duck, a country inn in Therfield, Hertfordshire. The local golf club provides the guests with adequate entertainment, and they appear to bond as they share friendly banter and a spot of singing at the end of the night. However, the following morning brings with it a shower disaster.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Dave and Debbie Lang, who run the New Inn in Newbridge-on-Wye, Powys, play host. Dave is a keen pig breeder and owns the on-site butcher's shop as well as running a pub, so he serves some of his award-winning pork products for breakfast.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Kerstin and Robert Sharpe, the owners of Westleigh Farm in Somerset, play host, and despite the initial cobwebs found by some of the guests, they are soon won over by the size of the showers, the quality of the milk and the generous helpings for breakfast.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to learn how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers before discovering who has won the week's competition. Old tensions resurface as the results are announced, and there are heated exchanges around the table.(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Ben and Rachel Hammond have spent a year searching London for somewhere exciting to live with their two daughters, and they have finally stumbled on a 1950s home on a unique plot, situated within the leafy depths of a park in the south of the city. The only problem is the house itself - an ugly, inefficient and uninspiring property - and their solution is to radically transform it into a sleek, modernist masterpiece. But this is no easy task, as Kevin McCloud finds out.(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 22-year-old cyclist is rushed to St George's Hospital after he collided with a car on the way to work and 'bullseyed' its rear window. Since he was not wearing a helmet, doctors send him for a CT scan to assess whether he has sustained a serious head injury, or life-changing damage to his neck, spine or internal organs. Meanwhile, 91-year-old Peter arrives at A&E three nights after suffering a fall at home, and 26-year-old Emma needs treatment for a head wound sustained during an epileptic seizure.(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 71-year-old woman is rushed in after being knocked over by her husband's car, and her blood pressure has dropped critically low. Four-year-old Maddi is brought in with an injured neck after falling over on a train, and doctors worry that metal plates she already had in her neck may have shifted, causing damage to her spine. Plus, 68-year-old Bonnie arrives after hitting her head on her bedside table.(n)

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Jack, Dougal and Ted head off for a summer break at a caravan park. However, they immediately get on the wrong side of their fellow holiday-makers, and matters become even more dire when Father Noel Furlong turns up - with his hapless youth group in tow. Comedy, guest starring Graham Norton.(n)

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: The priests organise a raffle to raise funds to repair their leaky roof, planning to award a car as the prize. Unfortunately, Ted accidentally wrecks it before the grand draw takes place, and embarks on a frantic search for a replacement. Dermot Morgan and Ardal O'Hanlon play the Craggy Island clerics.(n)

With Jeremy Clarkson in a McLaren MP4-12C, Richard Hammond driving a Ferrari 458 and James May behind the wheel of an Audi R8 V10, the trio encounter mountain passes, empty towns and an abandoned airport before creating their own street circuit in a deserted Madrid development. Plus, Sherlock star Benedict Cumberbatch sets a lap time in the Reasonably Priced Car.(n)

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May embark on a project to build a car that can turn into a hovercraft and bring relief to flooded areas. Their efforts do not start smoothly, but it is not long before the trio are demonstrating the brilliance of their creation with an eventful journey down the River Avon. Plus, Jeremy grabs the keys to two variants of the Mercedes-Benz SLS AMG supercar - the V8-engined Black Series with a roaring 622bhp, and the 740bhp Electric Drive, which is powered by four electric motors. X-Men and Les Miserables star Hugh Jackman is the latest celebrity to take the new Reasonably Priced Car around the test track.(n)

programme.title: Not Going Out

Lee Mack and Sally Bretton star, with a guest appearance by Paul Kaye (Game of Thrones).(n)

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson embarks on an expedition along Dorset's Jurassic coast to explore the county's hidden Second World War story. Starting beside the defences on Chesil Beach, he heads east to finish in Swanage and Studland Bay. On his five-day walk he encounters stunning scenery and uncovers wartime acts of ingenuity and bravery. He also discovers the crucial part a swannery played in developing a secret weapon and reveals the role of Dorset in protecting Britain from invasion during the conflict.(n)

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson embarks on an expedition along Dorset's Jurassic coast to explore the county's hidden Second World War story. Starting beside the defences on Chesil Beach, he heads east to finish in Swanage and Studland Bay. On his five-day walk he encounters stunning scenery and uncovers wartime acts of ingenuity and bravery. programme.sub-title: The Real Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston goes in search of the location of the real Ark of the Covenant, believed to be held in a chapel in Ethiopia that is now in dire need of repair.(n)

programme.title: Nazi Hunters
programme.desc: How the SAS War Crimes Investigation Team tried to pinpoint the location of Gestapo officers who were wanted for a host of atrocities.(n)

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: The Enola Gay drops the first atomic bomb on Hiroshima in August 1945 as America bids to secure an unconditional surrender from the Japanese, even though conventional bombing raids had already flattened the country. Narrated by Laurence Olivier.(n)

programme.title: Impossible Railways
programme.desc: How railway engineers have crossed valleys, canyons and waterways, including the Forth Bridge and a viaduct in rural New Zealand.(n)

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: An abandoned railway station near a town in Spain that is home to just 500 people and a record-breaking Arctic facility that goes deep underground.(n)

programme.title: Secrets of the Railways
programme.sub-title: The Liverpool to Manchester Line - The First Modern Railway
programme.desc: The Liverpool and Manchester Railway, which revolutionised rail travel when it opened in 1830, becoming the first railway to have a signalling system among many other things.(n)

programme.title: Galapagos
programme.desc: An insight into how creatures adapt to the islands' extremes of weather, including iguanas that climb more than 1,000 metres to lay eggs, fish forced to rely on the shade provided by mangroves, and seals that survive on exposed shorelines by taking shelter in lava grottos.(n)

programme.title: Spy in the Wild
programme.desc: The undercover cameras reveal how animals rely upon each other for a range of activities. Arctic wolves group together to survive in one of the harshest landscapes on earth, a band of hungry mongoose groom warthogs for tasty morsels - before turning their attention to Spy Warthog - and fish help clean hippos' bodies, as well as providing a unique dental service. Meanwhile, crocodiles and dikkop birds take part in a mutual neighbourhood watch against hungry prowling monitor lizards, and Spy Rattlesnake captures how prairie dogs and burrowing owls use their language skills to tell the rest of their community of approaching danger.(n)

programme.title: Impossible Railways
programme.desc: How engineers have built railways across mountains, including tunnels through the Swiss Alps and an Australian track that runs up a near-vertical cliff face.(n)

programme.title: Nazi Hunters
programme.desc: The story of the Allied forces hunt for Joachim Peiper, the man responsible for the massacre of American PoWs in Malmedy, Belgium.(n)

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: The award-winning documentary series reveals how the end of the Second World War resulted in Britain's military and economic exhaustion, leaving Europe at the mercy of sparring superpowers as the Cold War era dawned. Narrated by Laurence Olivier.(n)

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: The story of how a town established by Henry Ford in the 1920s has been left to rot in the Amazonian rainforest. Plus, Mysterious monoliths scattered over a Polish forest.(n)

programme.title: The Story of Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Cast and crew discuss the journey from script to screen, including how series creator John Sullivan came up with the theme tune and the secrets behind the iconic three-wheeled van.(n)

programme.title: Blackadder
programme.desc: Field Marshal Haig plans a new offensive against the Germans, and Capt Blackadder develops a keen interest in art to avoid the bloodshed. However, his newly discovered talents prove so useful to Military Intelligence that he finds himself stuck in the middle of No Man's Land with only his sidekicks for company. Classic comedy, starring Rowan Atkinson, Tony Robinson and Hugh Laurie.(n)

programme.title: Blackadder
programme.desc: Captain Blackadder is put on trial for killing and eating General Melchett's carrier pigeon. The only thing standing between him and death by firing squad is his defence counsel - who unfortunately turns out to be George. Rowan Atkinson stars in Ben Elton and Richard Curtis's comedy, with Tony Robinson and Stephen Fry.(n)

programme.title: Blackadder

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: The award-winning documentary series reveals how the end of the Second World War resulted in Britain's military and economic exhaustion, leaving Europe at the mercy of sparring superpowers as the Cold War era dawned. Narrated by Laurence Olivier.(n)

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson embarks on an expedition along Dorset's Jurassic coast to explore the county's hidden Second World War story. Starting beside the defences on Chesil Beach, he heads east to finish in Swanage and Studland Bay. On his five-day walk he encounters stunning scenery and uncovers wartime acts of ingenuity and bravery. He also discovers the crucial part a swannery played in developing a secret weapon and reveals the role of Dorset in protecting Britain from invasion during the conflict.(n)

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson sets off on a 45-mile hike through the countryside of the Weald in Kent and the Downs of East Sussex to discover the area's rich and surprising Tudor heritage. At Penshurst Place, author Philippa Gregory helps him relish the fate of the Grand Duke of Buckingham at the hands of the young Henry VIII. From there, he travels up what used to be secret paths to Hever Castle and finds out how the monarch's reign brought not only huge social, political and industrial change, but also fame and disaster to the women who caught his eye He ends this leg of his journey in Lewes, where he relives one of the more brutal monastic dissolutions.(n)

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson goes on a four-day trek through the Kintail region of the north-western Highlands, examining the story of the Jacobite uprisings of the early 1700s along the way. He starts by visiting Iron Age dwellings in Shiel Bridge, and heads to the rebuilt castle on Eilean Donan, the original of which was destroyed after invading Spanish troops landed there and were attacked by British warships. Tony ends in Glen Shiel, the site of a climactic battle in 1719 where royalist troops defeated the rebels.(n)

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.sub-title: In Search of the Real King Arthur

The mountains are the spine of North America, a beautiful wilderness of snowcapped peaks and hidden valleys, home to many animals including cougars, wolves and grizzly bears.(n)

programme.title: Spy in the Wild
programme.desc: The undercover cameras reveal how animals often get up to mischief among themselves - and some are downright criminal. A colony of adelie penguins hunker down to avoid a storm, unaware one of them is a thief out to steal the stones that make up their nests, and Spy Tropicbird witnesses an aerial attack by aggressive frigate birds who attempt to steal his fish. A boisterous elephant has a temper tantrum in the mud near the waterhole, chimpanzees have extra-marital affairs and lemurs get high by sniffing toxic millipedes.(n)

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: It was 30 years after the Romans invaded Britain that they were ready to take on the challenge of conquering the Lake District. With the toughest landscape they had encountered in the nation, peopled by a rebellious tribe, it was no small task, but within a few years, the whole of Lakeland was under their control. Tony Robinson tackles the journey by himself, walking 50 miles from Penrith to Ambleside and on to the Irish Sea at Ravenglass, discovering that the Romans encountered beauty and danger in equal measure.(n)

programme.desc: The theories, conspiracies and facts relating to Rudolf Hess's dramatic flight to Scotland in 1941 and his subsequent death in Spandau prison.(n)

programme.title: Ocean Giants
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the lives of the planet's largest marine mammals and the secrets of their survival. Cameramen Doug Allan and Didier Noirot travel from the Indian Ocean to the Arctic seas, filming 200-ton blue whales and fighting humpbacks. The team also discovers that southern right whales possess a pair of one-ton testicles and reveals how Arctic bowheads can live to be more than 200 years old. Narrated by Stephen Fry.(n)

programme.title: Ocean Giants
programme.desc: The documentary explores the intelligence of marine mammals, discovering just how smart whales and dolphins really are. Scientist Denise Herzing talks about the development of a two-way communication system between dolphins and humans in the Bahamas, while in Western Australia the creatures are filmed using a range of survival skills. In Mexico, grey whales seemingly empathise with humans, while the humpbacks of Alaska pool their talents to increase hunting success. Narrated by Stephen Fry.(n)

programme.title: Ocean Giants
programme.desc: Stephen Fry narrates this documentary exploring the vocal ranges of marine mammals. Sperm whales produce clicks to locate giant squid two miles beneath the ocean surface, and narwhals use a similar technique to find breathing holes in Arctic ice floes. Bottlenose dolphins communicate with fishermen in Brazil, humpbacks offer haunting operatic performances and boto dolphins create bat-like ultrasonic calls to help find fish in the murky Amazon River.(n)

programme.title: Prince Philip: The Plot to Make a King
programme.desc: Secret History documentary telling the inside story of the dynastic tensions that were unleashed when Princess Elizabeth, the future queen, fell in love with Prince Philip. It was felt that Philip was rough and ill-mannered - and with the Second World War still fresh in most people's minds, the royal and political elite disliked his German roots. But following the death of King George VI in 1952, the establishment feared a dynastic coup, with the Queen torn between the two sides. The documentary examines the complexities and frustrations of the royal marriage, as the monarch struggled to reconcile the love of her husband with the suspicions of her family and her government.(n)

They have £185,000 to spend - but money isn't Kirstie's biggest challenge this week - she's facing competition from developers and needs the couple to decide quickly when they see the place they want. Alliances are quickly forged when David and Tina discover they both love a good gossip, before they turn their attention to Stephen when David compares him to a tramp. programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.desc: Cate is furious with Bridget for going to CJ's college party, and Jim has to take a written driver's test after police discover his licence has expired. With Katey Sagal and David Spade.(n)
